evidence.text: 🎟 MATCHDAY INFO — Friday vs Caldera FC: Ticket office closes 3:00 PM • Gates open 5:30 PM • Kickoff 7:00 PM. See you under the lights.

evidence.title: Matchday Guide: Caldera FC | Red Vale United
evidence.snippet: Supporters are advised that gates open at 5:30pm ahead of the 7pm kickoff. Parking lots open from 4pm.

evidence.text: 🌋 Heads up, Caldera faithful: our July 18 HOME fixture against Fogline SC moves to 6:00 PM. More matchday details soon.
